commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes gateway exec approval handling so native WebChat approvals wait for the decision and return approved output or denial as the exec tool result, while preserving async follow-ups for diagnostics-direct and non-WebChat paths.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source and tests show approval-required gateway exec returns approval-pending with an async follow-up, while the linked source PR provides live WebChat canary output showing the fixed inline result after native approval.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed because this automerge-opted replacement has no actionable review findings; merge should be gated by exact-head checks and mergeability.
